response.justification: The candidate lacks critical required qualifications: no evidence of C programming for UNIX embedded systems, no Linux kernel modification experience, no exposure to embedded networking or security technologies like MACsec or 802.1X, and no Japanese language proficiency — all essential for this role.
strengths: Strong full-stack experience across multiple languages and platforms
Demonstrated expertise in open-source contributions and developer tooling
Proven ability to work in cross-functional teams and build CI/CD infrastructure
concerns: No C or embedded firmware development experience in networking/security context
Zero indication of Japanese language proficiency (mandatory requirement)
No experience with LAN-switch products, Linux kernel analysis, or security protocols like MACsec/802.1X
